meaning: n.(古代高卢人、布立吞人等戴的)金属饰环,金属项圈,金属颈环
examples: Torc of leech free: This item is a band inlaid with precious metal, worn around the neck or upper arm.
For instance, an exhausting torc appears to be a torc of free will until a brain lock effect targets the wearer, who loses 1 power point.
Instinet acquired TORC Financial, a derivatives trading technology firm, last August.
